auditor_address: 250 E. 200 S., Suite 1200, Salt Lake City, UT 84111

franchise_fees.initial_recognition: ~50% upon franchise opening and completion of training
franchise_fees.early_closure: Remaining unamortized amount recognized immediately upon location closure
franchise_fees.pre_opening_basis: Pre-opening training and services are individually distinct from ongoing services

royalties.recognition: Monthly, using narrow exception for sales-based/usage-based royalties under ASC 606
royalties.timing: Recognized based on sales reports from franchisees

revenue_recognition.renewal_fees: Recognized when renewal agreement becomes effective
revenue_recognition.portfolio_approach: Elected — reasonably expected not to differ materially from individual contract approach
revenue_recognition.tax_exclusion_election: Revenue presented net of sales taxes (amounts collected on behalf of third parties excluded)

accounts_receivable.stated_at: Amount billed plus accrued unpaid interest
accounts_receivable.allowance: Based on review of outstanding receivables, historical collection info, economic conditions
accounts_receivable.interest_cessation: After 1 year past due; resumes when no longer classified delinquent

contract_liabilities.nature: Obligation to transfer goods/services when consideration already received

long_lived_asset_impairment.policy: Evaluate recoverability when events/circumstances indicate carrying amount may not be recoverable. If undiscounted future cash flows < carrying amount, adjust to fair value.

use_of_estimates.description: Required under GAAP. Key estimates include allowances for credit losses.

income_tax_provision.tax_treatment: Pass-through — taxable income reported to individual member
income_tax_provision.federal_provision: None — income flows through to member

state_ptet.accounting_treatment: Recorded as distribution to member (not tax expense)
state_ptet.federal_treatment: Deducted on Company's federal return, reducing taxable income allocated to member

lease_accounting.notes: No lease assets or liabilities disclosed. The franchise entity does not appear to hold leases — it operates from its parent's facilities. Franchisees lease their own premises.

receivable_from_parent.nature: Marketing revenues earned by franchisor for which cash was received by parent Cupbop Co.

payable_to_parent.nature: Prior year expenses paid by parent company on behalf of franchisor

advertising_fund_accounting.accounting_treatment: Advertising costs expensed as incurred; included in SG&A

concentration_risk.description: Majority of accounts receivable from one customer

asu_2016_13_cecl.impact: No material effect on financial statements

members_equity.description: One class of member's equity; wholly-owned subsidiary of Cupbop Co.
